violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. No squeeze guard was on the hot dog roller at time of inspection.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. Observed pulled pork and chili that was not at 140F in the warmer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface Fridge/Freezer and microwave was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Drain has food debris in it.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Dumping food in sink is not allowed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Floor/step going into cooking area needs repaired.
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
